title: Trump says US to leave Iran ‘very soon,’ deal or not
summary_full: "We're finishing the job, and I think within maybe two weeks, maybe a couple of days longer," US forces will leave, Trump said.
summary_public: "We're finishing the job, and I think within maybe two weeks, maybe a couple of days longer," US forces will leave, Trump said.

IR.label: neutral
